caption: A woman with glasses, wearing a blue top and a white cardigan with blue floral patterns, sits at a white desk in a craft room. In the background, shelves hold numerous colorful markers, containers, and craft tools, including scissors and a heat tool. On the desk before her are various supplies, including a small box of stamps and a white tray. A watermark in the bottom left corner reads "Stamping Fill". Across the sequence, the woman remains seated and speaks, her facial expressions and mouth movements shifting as she talks. She rests her hands on the desk, with her left hand near a stamp set and her right hand wearing a smartwatch. The camera angle remains static, capturing her from the waist up as she interacts with the items on the table.
